items.title: 'Miles away' - Havertz 'lucky' to avoid red card
items.summary: Kai Havertz takes Arsenal closer to winning their first Premier League title in 22 years, but nearly goes from hero to villain as he escapes a red card.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Brendan Sorsby files injunction vs. NCAA: Texas Tech QB seeks 2026 eligibility amid gambling probe
items.summary: The Texas Tech signal-caller took an indefinite hiatus from the team in April to seek treatment for gambling addiction
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Cummins, Kishan, Klaasen power SRH into playoffs; CSK not out yet
items.summary: The win for SRH also took Gujarat Titans into the playoffs as CSK finished their home leg with a loss
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
